title: The Broken Spire
hint: Tap the Red Handle to rotate.

title: Ascension
hint: Use the Red Handle to rise.

title: The Fork
hint: Align the bridges.

title: The First Lift Turn
hint: Ride the lift, then turn the bridge.

title: The Bent Causeway
hint: Make the first turn before raising the route.

title: Two-Step Ascent
hint: Lift, cross, then climb once more.

title: The Quiet Switchback
hint: Lift the corner, then turn back across the exposed arm.

title: Folded Corner
hint: The path climbs by turning back on itself.

title: The Raised Elbow
hint: Raise the corner, then rebuild the crossing.

title: Outer Spiral
hint: Follow the outer edge before the last rise.

title: The Split Climb
hint: Use each side of the structure in order.

title: The Long Gap
hint: Build the route in three clean stages.

title: Twin Mechanism
hint: Two lifted corners must be aligned in order.

title: The Stepped Circuit
hint: Climb a longer circuit while keeping the path open.

title: The Upper Grid
hint: Read the grid, then unlock each rise.

title: The Grand Switchback
hint: A longer final climb before the new temple wing.

title: Bridge Arms
hint: Rotate the long arms, then climb.

title: The Folding Route
hint: Build the rectangle before the ascent.

title: Counterweight Walk
hint: Use each rise to reach the next arm.

title: The Inner Circuit
hint: Complete the circuit before crossing inward.

title: The Upper Mandala
hint: A longer final structure of arms and lifts.
